body.tpl:
项目总数
${totalCount|default:0}

未完成任务
${totalCount|default:0}

未完成里程碑
${totalCount|default:0}

工时记录数
${totalCount|default:0}

api.adaptor: var counts={}; (payload.data||[]).forEach(function(p){var s=p.status||'unknown'; counts[s]=(counts[s]||0)+1;}); var labelMap={planning:'规划中',in_progress:'进行中',completed:'已完成',closed:'已关闭',unknown:'未知'}; var data=Object.keys(counts).map(function(k){return {name:labelMap[k]||k, value:counts[k]};}); return {status:0, msg:'', data:{series:[{type:'pie', radius:'60%', data:data, label:{formatter:'{b}: {c} ({d}%)'}}], tooltip:{trigger:'item'}, legend:{orient:'vertical', left:'left'}}};

var counts={}; (payload.data||[]).forEach(function(t){var s=t.status||'unknown'; counts[s]=(counts[s]||0)+1;}); var labelMap={todo:'待办',in_progress:'进行中',completed:'已完成',cancelled:'已取消',unknown:'未知'}; var keys=Object.keys(counts); return {status:0, msg:'', data:{xAxis:{type:'category', data:keys.map(function(k){return labelMap[k]||k;})}, yAxis:{type:'value'}, series:[{type:'bar', data:keys.map(function(k){return counts[k];}), itemStyle:{color:'#3b82f6'}}], tooltip:{trigger:'axis'}}};

var sums={}; (payload.data||[]).forEach(function(t){var u=(t.user&&(t.user.name||t.user._id))||'未知'; sums[u]=(sums[u]||0)+(t.hours||0);}); var arr=Object.keys(sums).map(function(k){return {name:k, hours:sums[k]};}).sort(function(a,b){return b.hours-a.hours;}).slice(0,10); return {status:0, msg:'', data:{xAxis:{type:'value'}, yAxis:{type:'category', data:arr.map(function(a){return a.name;}).reverse()}, series:[{type:'bar', data:arr.map(function(a){return a.hours;}).reverse(), itemStyle:{color:'#10b981'}}], tooltip:{trigger:'axis'}, grid:{left:80}}};

var arr=(payload.data||[]); return {status:0, msg:'', data:{xAxis:{type:'category', data:arr.map(function(p){return p.name;}), axisLabel:{interval:0, rotate:30}}, yAxis:{type:'value'}, series:[{name:'预算', type:'bar', data:arr.map(function(p){return p.budget||0;}), itemStyle:{color:'#60a5fa'}}, {name:'实际成本', type:'bar', data:arr.map(function(p){return p.actual_cost||0;}), itemStyle:{color:'#f87171'}}], tooltip:{trigger:'axis'}, legend:{data:['预算','实际成本']}}};
